name: Almond Crescents by Brigitte Sealing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Beat butter and almond extract until fluffy.
3. Gradually beat in powdered sugar.
4. Add combined flour and salt; mix well.
5. Stir in oats and almonds.
6. Shape into crescents.
7. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 15-18 minutes, or until light golden brown.
9. Sift powdered sugar over warm crescents.
